title: Decorative Fences
description: Adds new fences made of wood and iron, ideal for decorating, protecting, and customizing your buildings in Minecraft
body:
![decorative fences](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87563022909a2e258780ef33a3d285d7ffb89712.png)

Decorative Fences adds a wide variety of decorative fences made of wood, iron, and different types of brick,

perfect for giving your buildings a unique and detailed touch.

**FENCES**

![fences](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3550da52ab4b84384cd5a78cfa24f5a3e09ea389.jpeg)

**FENCE GATE**

![fence gate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95f235a1ccbe84a86cfde78dcd3404b45e259f21.png)

**WIDE HALF BLOCKS FOR CRAFTING FENCES AND GATE ARE MADE OF:**

BRICKS | STONE BRICKS | MOSSY STONE BRICKS | POLISHED BLACKSTONE BRICKS | DEEPSLATE BRICKS 
NETHER BRICKS END | STONE BRICKS | QUARTZ BRICKS | RESINE BRICKS | MUD BRICKS | TUFF BRICKS
POLISHED GRANITE | POLISHED DIORITE |POLISHED ANDESITE | COBBLESTONE FENCE | MOSSY COBBLESTONE
WHITE CONCRETE | IRON BLOCK | OAK PLANKS | SPRUCE PLANKS | BIRCH PLANKS | JUNGLEPLANKS | ACACIA
PLANKS| DARK OAKPLANKS | MANGROVE PLANKS | CHERRY PLANKS | PALE PLANKS |BAMBOO PLANKS
CRIMSON PLANKS | WARPED PLANKS

FOR THE MANUFACTURE OF SPECIAL BLOCKS SUCH AS: WHITE OAK AND BLACK IRON

White fences are crafted with the half a wide plank of oak + white dye
fences black iron are crafted with the half a wide block of iron + black dye

![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/944505507c3cf17dd5f4dc018a16b9b719d91059.png)
